variables.label: Actual Treatment (N) for Period 01
variables.derivation_notes: Numeric actual treatment code from ACTARMCD

variables.label: Safety Population Flag
variables.derivation_notes: Y if subject received at least one dose of study drug

variables.label: Efficacy Population Flag
variables.derivation_notes: Y if subject has at least one post-baseline efficacy assessment

variables.label: Completers of Week 24 Population Flag
variables.derivation_notes: Y if subject completed Week 24 visit

variables.label: Height at Baseline (cm)
variables.derivation_notes: From VS domain where VSTESTCD='HEIGHT' and baseline visit

variables.label: Weight at Baseline (kg)
variables.derivation_notes: From VS domain where VSTESTCD='WEIGHT' and baseline visit

variables.label: MMSE Total Score
variables.derivation_notes: From QS domain, Mini-Mental State Examination total score at screening

variables.label: Disposition Discontinued Flag
variables.derivation_notes: Y if subject discontinued from study early

variables.label: Discontinued Due to AE Flag
variables.derivation_notes: Y if DCSREAS indicates adverse event as reason

variables.label: End of Study Status
variables.derivation_notes: Completed or Discontinued from DS domain
